name: Ascent Hoodie
description_html:
Midweight warmth with a slightly oversized fit.
The Ascent Performance Hoodie delivers comfort and structure with breathable, moisture-wicking fabric and subtle 4-way stretch. Finished with functional details and a relaxed athletic drape for training, recovery, and everyday wear.

  • 4 way stretch
  • Moisture wicking
  • Breathable fabric
  • Athletic fit

name: Ascent Performance Shorts
description_html:
Comfortable, durable, and built for training days.
The Ascent Performance Shorts are designed with a functional athletic fit, combining moisture-wicking, breathable fabric and 4-way stretch for unrestricted movement. Clean, durable, and made to perform without distractions.

  • 4 way stretch
  • Moisture wicking
  • Breathable fabric
  • Athletic fit

name: Ascent Performance Socks (2 Pairs)
description_html:
Rep Kaged from the bottom up with the Ascent Performance Sock. It’s engineered with a moisture-wicking blend that keeps you dry and comfortable through every phase of training. An 80% cotton base with polyester and nylon reinforcement delivers durability where you need it most.

Two pairs. One size fits most. Machine washable.

  • Moisture Wicking Performance Socks
  • 2 Pairs
  • One Size fits Most
  • Machine Washable

name: Ascent Performance Tee
description_html:
Lightweight, breathable, and built to perform.
The Ascent Performance Tee features a streamlined athletic fit with moisture-wicking, breathable fabric and 4-way stretch for unrestricted movement. Designed for high-output training with all-day comfort and durability.
Part of the next phase of Kaged performance apparel: premium, purpose-driven design.
  • 4 way stretch
  • Moisture wicking
  • Breathable fabric
  • Athletic fit

name: Ascent Straight Leg Sweats
description_html:
Straight-leg jogger constructed from a midweight 75% cotton / 25% spandex fleece. Fabric has a soft, plush interior with a smooth exterior and moderate stretch for mobility. Features include an elastic waistband with drawstrings finished in flat rubber tips, a right-side concealed zip pocket for secure storage, and standard hand pockets. White stitch detailing runs down the side seams for a subtle technical accent.
Branding includes a small Kaged logo on the upper left front and the Ascent symbol placed on the back of the lower leg.

Specs:
  • Weight: Midweight fleece
  • Fit: Straight leg
  • Right-side zip pocket
  • Standard front hand pockets
  • Details: White side-seam stitching
  • Front Kaged logo
  • Back-of-leg Ascent symbol

name: Ascent Tee
description_html:
Midweight fitted tee constructed from a 95% cotton / 5% spandex blend for a smooth hand feel with moderate stretch. The pattern is cut with a close fit through the sleeves and torso. Branding includes the Ascent mark placed on the front chest and a large Kaged wordmark across the back.

Specs:
  • Fabric: 95% cotton / 5% spandex
  • Weight: Midweight jersey
  • Fit: Fitted through sleeves and torso
  • Branding:
    • Front: Ascent logo
    • Back: Large Kaged wordmark

name: BCAA 2:1:1
description_html:
The branched-chain amino acids are key building blocks of protein that help reduce muscle breakdown and encourage muscle growth. Our fermented BCAAs come from 100% plant-based sources. This pure, unflavored powder mixes easily, so it’s perfect to add to any stack anytime you need quality fuel for your muscles.*

  • Mixes Easily
  • No Flavors Or Colors Added
  • Banned Substance Free & Safe For Athletes
  • Suitable For Strict Diets

name: Blender Bottle - Classic
description_html: The perfect way to mix and take your powdered Kaged supplements on the go.

name: Casein
description_html:
Kaged Casein is a 100% micellar isolate, slow-digesting protein. It’s perfect whether you need slow-release protein overnight, or a satiating protein to carry you through the day. It goes through a micro-filtration process, so it contains only 1g of sugar and less than 1% lactose. It’s Informed-Sport Certified, so it’s safer for athletes.*
  • Anti-Catabolic
  • Improve Muscle Recovery
  • Maximize Muscle Gains

name: Circle Tee
description_html: The Circle Tee is designed for those who demand both style and performance. Featuring the bold Kaged circle logo, this tee offers a sleek, minimalist look that stands out effortlessly. Crafted with premium, breathable fabric, it ensures all-day comfort whether you're hitting the gym or running daily errands. Its durable construction supports an active lifestyle, maintaining shape and softness after repeated washes. Elevate your wardrobe with this versatile piece that balances classic design with functional performance. Ideal for fitness enthusiasts seeking reliable comfort and understated style.

name: Citrulline
description_html:
Citrulline boosts nitric oxide production, which leads to enhanced blood flow and powerful muscle pumps. It also improves strength and power. Our fermented l-citrulline is plant-based. This pure, unflavored powder mixes easily, so it’s perfect to add to any stack to improve your pumps and performance.*
  • Improve Stamina*
  • Cardiovascular Support*
  • Support Athletic Endurance*

name: Clean Burn Capsules
description_html:
Clean Burn® is a stimulant-free weight-loss product with 5 key ingredients that help boost metabolism, increase thermogenesis, and support overall weight-loss.* With convenient capsules Clean Burn® helps you get the physique you deserve, without losing sight of your health.*

  • Thermogenic Weight Loss
  • Powered by Patented Ingredients like CapsiMax®
  • Loaded With Active Ingredients

name: Clean Burn Powder
description_html: Clean Burn® with ACV is a great-tasting, health-first fat loss drink. With key ingredients like Capsimax® and organic guayana, this thermogenic powder will help you achieve the physique you deserve.*

name: Clean Meal™
description_html: Clean Meal is a clean, convenient, and complete meal replacement shake. Each scoop has 28g of enhanced-absorption whey protein isolate, 18g of organic quinoa and oats, 4g of MCT oil from coconut oil, whole-food micronutrients, and 2g of sugar or less. In two delicious flavors, Clean Meal is the perfect on-the-go meal for those who value high-quality nutrition.

name: CreaClear™
description_html: CreaClear® is a patented form of creatine monohydrate that uses advanced technology, allowing it to mix 100% clear in water. The result is better absorption, reduced bloating, and more benefits. It's the same proven creatine monohydrate, with smarter delivery for your body.

name: Creatine HCl™
description_html: Kaged Creatine HCl® is a premium creatine supplement featuring an ultra-soluble, patented form of creatine hydrochloride. This means you can get all the benefits of creatine in a stomach-friendly, better-mixing form. Backed by science and with no artificial flavors or colors, Kaged Creatine HCl® helps you lift more and build more muscle.*

name: Creatine Monohydrate
description_html: Creatine Monohydrate is one of the most well-researched supplements in existence, shown to help build muscle, increase strength, and improve performance.* Our creatine monohydrate is third-party tested for hundreds of banned substances and uses a micronized form so it mixes easily and goes down smooth.

name: Creatine Monohydrate Elite
description_html: Creatine monohydrate is one of the most well-researched supplements in existence, shown to help build muscle, increase strength, and improve performance.* Creatine Monohydrate Elite takes the power of creatine further, thanks to the addition of MAXCatalyst™ Piper nigrum fruit extract. This ingredient from black pepper has shown to increase the absorption of creatine. This is the next evolution of creatine for max strength, max power, and max lean mass.*

name: Creatine Monohydrate Stick
description_html: Creatine Monohydrate + MAX Catalyst™ Sticks deliver the proven power of creatine in a more convenient, better-absorbing format. Each flavored stick provides pure creatine monohydrate enhanced with MAX Catalyst™ to help support absorption and muscle utilization.* Easy to take, great tasting, and built to support strength, performance, and daily consistency.*

name: Creatine Monohydrate Stick Box - 25ct
description_html: Creatine Monohydrate + MAX Catalyst™ Stick Packs deliver the proven power of creatine in a more convenient, better-absorbing format. Each flavored stick provides pure creatine monohydrate enhanced with MAX Catalyst™ to help support absorption and muscle utilization.* Easy to take, great tasting, and built to support strength, performance, and daily consistency.*

name: Dad Hat
description_html:
FEATURES

  • 100% Cotton
  • Unstructured, Low Profile
  • Unisex

name: Daily Wellness Stack
description_html: Feeling your best isn't about one big change; it's about the small, consistent habits that add up over time. The Daily Wellness Stack gives you three premium daily essentials that work together to support your energy, health, and vitality from the inside out. Organic Greens Elite delivers 26 premium organic ingredients alongside 21 whole-food vitamins and minerals to fuel your energy, support your gut, and strengthen your immune system. Kaged Hydration keeps your body replenished and functioning at its best with 5 essential electrolytes, taurine, and a powerful antioxidant blend, whether you're at the gym, the office, or on the go. Kaged Omega-3 rounds out the stack with clean, high-absorption EPA and DHA from wild-caught fish oil to support your heart, sharpen your mind, and keep your joints feeling their best. Three daily essentials, one healthier you.

name: Elite Performance Stack
description_html: The Elite Performance Stack is for athletes who take their training seriously and want supplements that match that commitment. Every product in this stack is formulated at the highest level, designed to work together and deliver results you can actually feel. Pre-Workout Elite brings 21 science-backed ingredients at premium doses to sharpen your focus, amplify your power, and elevate every session from the first rep to the last. Protein Isolate Elite rebuilds what you've worked for; ultrafiltered, 100% isolate protein in a precise 3:1:1 ratio of fast, medium, and slow-digesting proteins, enhanced with MAXCatalyst™ for superior absorption and recovery. Creatine Monohydrate Elite builds on the most proven supplement in sports nutrition, adding MAXCatalyst™ to maximize absorption and deliver more strength, power, and lean mass over time. Three premium products, one complete system, built for athletes who train at the highest level.

name: Essential Performance Stack
description_html: Every great workout starts before you ever touch a weight. The Essential Performance Stack combines three foundational supplements that work together to elevate every session, every time. Pre-Workout Sport primes your body with clean organic caffeine, essential electrolytes, and patented ingredients so you show up sharp and ready to perform. CreaClear® delivers the proven strength and power benefits of creatine monohydrate with smarter absorption and none of the bloating, so more of what you take actually works.* When it's time to replenish, Kaged Hydration restores fluid balance with 5 essential electrolytes, taurine, and a premium antioxidant blend to keep your body firing on all cylinders in and out of the gym. Three products, one complete foundation. Your best performance starts here.

name: Glutamine
description_html:
Glutamine is an amino acid that aids in tissue repair, muscle growth, and recovery.* It also plays a role in gut and intestinal health.* Our fermented glutamine is 100% plant-based. This pure, unflavored powder mixes easily, so it’s perfect to add to any muscle-building or recovery stack. 

  • Rapid Recovery
  • Builds Muscle
  • Fights Fatigue

description_html:

Hydration (Hydra-Charge®) is a delicious electrolyte drink mix that provides hydration, endurance, and antioxidant support for athletes of all levels, all with less than 1g of sugar.* 

  • Delivers 5 Essential Electrolytes

  • Refreshing, Delicious & Thirst Quenching

name: Intra-Workout (In-Kaged)
description_html: Kaged Intra-Workout is a high-quality intra-workout for advanced lifters, or the perfect pre-workout for beginners. It provides 124mg of PurCaf® organic caffeine for clean energy and an amino acid matrix including BCAAs and L-Citrulline for muscle recovery and pumps.* With clean, premium ingredients you can trust and only 1g of carbs, it tastes great without colors or flavors from artificial sources and is third-party certified. Kaged Intra-Workout helps you finish your workouts stronger than you started.*

name: Kaged x UNRL® Apex Training Pants
description_html: Engineered for athletes and fitness enthusiasts, the Kaged x UNRL® Apex Training Pants combine premium materials with a performance-focused design. These tapered joggers offer a streamlined fit that enhances mobility while providing all-day comfort thanks to their ultra-soft, breathable fabric. Whether you're hitting the gym or navigating a busy day, their durable construction and refined tailoring ensure you stay comfortable without compromising style. Trust in a design that supports intense training sessions and effortless daily wear, making these pants an essential addition to your athletic wardrobe.

name: Men's Health Bundle
description_html:
This one’s for the gym and after the gym.
The Test + Citrulline Bundle supports two things every man wants more of: healthy testosterone levels and serious blood flow. In other words, performance where it counts.

TEST (Ferodrox®) helps support testosterone levels already within the normal, healthy range, creating an optimal anabolic environment for strength, muscle, energy, and overall vitality.* L-Citrulline supports nitric oxide production for better pumps, better circulation, and better endurance.*

Put them together and you get more drive, better training sessions, and let’s just say… improved confidence when it’s time to clock out of the gym. Whether your Valentine’s plans involve lifting heavy, going out, or staying in, this stack helps you show up feeling stronger, fuller, and ready for whatever the night brings.

Gym gains and relationship gains. All in one bundle.

name: Multivitamin
description_html: The whole-food multivitamin with 21 essential vitamins and minerals. It’s sourced from organic fruits and vegetables, so you can actually absorb the key micronutrients. Bioavailable, properly dosed, and with prebiotic fibers to cover your nutritional bases.*

name: Omega-3
description_html:
Kaged Omega-3 is a wild-caught, purified fish oil that promotes healthy joints and supports your heart and brain health.* We use high-absorption triglycerides with high doses of EPA and DHA fatty acids, sustainably caught and ethically sourced-certified.
  • 1100mg EPA + 900mg DHA
  • High-Absorption Triglycerides
  • Fish-Burp Free
  • Supports Heart, Brain + Joint Health*

name: Organic Greens Elite
description_html: Organic Greens Elite is one of the most powerful, best-tasting greens powder on the market. It has 26 premium organic ingredients that help you feel more energized and live healthier.* It promotes gut health, immune health, and natural energy.* We also added 21 vitamins and minerals from whole-food sources to cover all of your nutritional bases.*

name: Post-Workout Protein (Re-Kaged)
description_html:
Kaged Post Workout Protein is more than just a protein powder, it’s a complete post
workout recovery drink. With 28g of high-absorption ioWhey® protein isolate, creatine
HCl, glutamine, and BetaPower® Betaine, it will help you support your muscle growth
and recovery from your intense training sessions.*

  • Build Muscle
  • Recover From Intense Training
  • Enzyme Support
  • Banned Substance Free

name: Pre-Workout (Pre-Kaged)
description_html:
The award-winning pre-workout with clean ingredients to improve your energy, strength, pumps, and performance. With just one scoop you’ll feel ready to attack your workout. It’s suitable for vegans and Informed-Sport Certified for athletes.*

  • Boost Energy + Endurance*
  • Trigger Incredible Pumps*
  • Heighten Mental Focus*
  • Third-Party Tested + Banned Substance Free
  • Suitable for Vegan/Vegetarian Diets

name: Pre-Workout (Pre-Kaged) Stim Free
description_html:

The award-winning pre-workout with clean ingredients to improve your energy, strength, pumps, and performance. With just one scoop you’ll feel ready to attack your workout. It’s suitable for vegans and Informed-Sport Certified for athletes.* 
  • Enhance Endurance with NO Caffeine
  • Trigger Incredible Pumps
  • Heighten Mental Focus
  • Third-Party Tested + Banned Substance Free

name: Pre-Workout Elite
description_html: Our most elite pre-workout ever formulated, with 21 premium ingredients for your most intense training sessions. It promotes increased energy, sharper mental focus, raw power, and bigger pumps. We include MAXCatalyst™ Piper nigrum fruit extract, an ingredient shown to increase absorption of Beta-alanine, Creatine, and L-citrulline.* The best workouts of your life begin now.

name: Pre-Workout Elite Stimulant Free
description_html: Our most elite pre-workout ever formulated, with 18 premium ingredients for your most intense training sessions, now available in a caffeine-free version. It promotes sharper mental focus, raw power, and bigger pumps. We include MAXCatalyst™ Piper nigrum fruit extract, an ingredient shown to increase absorption of Beta-alanine, Creatine, and L-citrulline.* The best workouts of your life begin now.

name: Pre-Workout Max
description_html: Every transformation starts with a catalyst. In the body, that catalyst is absorption; the moment ingredients go from potential to power. Pre-Workout MAX delivers more with clean energy, enhanced blood flow, and better absorption from MAXCatalyst™, all without the crash, jitters, or tingles.* Backed by the latest research, this pre-workout delivers serious performance in a clean formula.

name: Pre-Workout Sport
description_html:
Pre-Workout Sport is our most versatile pre-workout, perfect for the gym, cardio, and athletics. It contains organic caffeine for energy and focus, essential electrolytes, and patented key ingredients at key doses.* Plus, it tastes incredible without any colors or flavors from artificial sources. Pre-Workout Sport is your new pre-gym ritual for better workouts.
  • Provides Clean Energy + Mental Clarity
  • Improves Endurance + Athletic Performance
  • Supports Hydration + Fluid Balance
  • Specially Formulated for Athletes

name: Protein Isolate Elite
description_html: Protein Isolate Elite is the king of protein supplements. It’s ultrafiltered, using only 100% isolate proteins to cut out unwanted sugar, fat, and filler. It uses a perfect 3:1:1 ratio of fast, medium, and slow-digesting proteins for muscle building and recovery.* Plus, we added MAXCatalyst™ to support absorption, all while tasting like an ice cream shake.*

name: PurCaf® Caffeine
description_html:
Kaged Caffeine provides clean energy whatever you need it.* It comes from patented PurCaf® caffeine from organic green coffee bean, rather than synthetic sources. This high-absorption caffeine provides a boost whenever you need it, whether for training or peak productivity.*

  • Powerful Energy Boost
  • Organic Source of Caffeine
  • Highly Absorbable
  • Zero Artificial Colors, Flavors & Sweeteners

name: Stainless Steel Shaker - Mint
description_html: In a perfect blend of style and performance, the Strada™ Sleek goes beyond the ordinary shaker. It's where form meets function, creating a harmonious symphony of elegance and practicality. Say hello to a whole new level of sophistication with the Strada™ Sleek!

name: Starter Stack
description_html: The Kaged Starter Stack is the easiest way to get into a supplement routine that actually works. You'll get 15 servings of Hydra-Charge® electrolyte mix, packed with 5 essential electrolytes and powerful antioxidant support with no artificial colors or dyes, alongside 25 servings of our Creatine Monohydrate stick packs, enhanced with MAX Catalyst™ for better absorption and muscle utilization. Both come in convenient, great-tasting stick pack formats so there's no scooping, no mess, and no guesswork. Toss everything into the included BPA-free, dishwasher-safe 28oz shaker bottle and you're ready to go. Whether you're new to Kaged or just building your first stack, this is the perfect place to start.

name: Test (Ferodrox)
description_html:
Test (Ferodrox) is an all-natural supplement that supports healthy testosterone production and helps manage cortisol. With 6 premium ingredients in efficacious, scientific doses, Ferodrox helps create the ideal anabolic ecosystem for more muscle, increased strength, and optimal hormone levels.*
  • Powerful testosterone support
  • Science-backed ingredients
  • Transparent formula

name: Test Elite
description_html: Kaged TEST Elite uses patented, innovative ingredients to help naturally increase testosterone levels. It helps increase both free total testosterone and helps manage healthy cortisol levels. This creates an ideal anabolic ecosystem for more muscle, increased strength, and feeling your best. It also supports prostate health and blood flow, which decline with age. TEST Elite is for men to reclaim their drive, vitality, and manhood.

name: Whey Protein Isolate
description_html:
Whey Protein Isolate is a stomach-friendly, fast-digesting protein. With 25 grams of 100% whey isolate, only 1g of sugar, and digestive enzymes, this whey will help you build lean muscle and support recovery. It's Informed-Sport certified, so it's safer for athletes*

  • Perfect Protein Shake for Any Workout 
  • Naturally Flavored 
  • 25g Pure Whey Protein Isolate
